subcodes.first_line: It behooveth all the loved ones of Truth to ponder upon steadfastness and its degrees, that they may, with wisdom, proclaim the Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بر جمیع احبای حق لازمست که در استقامت و مراتب آن تفکر نمایند تا بحکمت بیان حق
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @empty learning; false spirituality, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @contemplation
